subject: a horned demon crouching on a wooden rafter, glowing eyes, chains visible below
description: A muscular demon perches on a heavy wooden beam or rafter, hunched forward with clawed hands gripping the wood. Two curved horns extend from its head and glowing orange-red eyes cut through the shadow. The demon's body is a deep reddish-brown, with rough, textured skin. Tattered fabric and hanging cloth hang from the rafters around it, suggesting an interior ceiling — perhaps a theater or tavern. A chain is visible near the lower portion of the figure. The ambient lighting is warm and orange, casting the scene in a hellish glow filtered through the draped fabric.
foreground: demon crouching on wooden beam, clawed hands visible, chains below
background: tattered hanging fabric, draped cloth, warm interior ambient light
